idea-plugin.name: Minecraft Color Formatter
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting for Minecraft legacy color codes (Bedrock palette) inside Java and Kotlin string literals.

Features

  • Real-time preview of § color codes in string literals
  • Supports the Bedrock palette including §0-§f and Bedrock-only material codes (§g, §h, ...)
  • Works with both direct section sign § and \u00A7 representations in source
